label: General PM loop
style: Balanced product sense, execution, behavioral, and communication expectations.

label: AI lab style
style: Raises the bar on eval design, model limitations, safety, privacy, reliability, and launch judgment.

label: Large tech style
style: Emphasizes structured product thinking, metrics, scale, stakeholder clarity, and crisp communication.

label: Startup style
style: Emphasizes speed, customer discovery, prioritization, resource constraints, and practical launch judgment.
